summary: Audit Log Export — compliance officer can trigger ad-hoc export with date range
description_md:
As a compliance-officer, I want to trigger an ad-hoc export of the audit log with a customizable date range so that I can retrieve historical records for external audits or regulatory reviews.

The Compliance Vault maintains a comprehensive audit log of all data access and modification events across tenant workspaces. Regulatory requirements often mandate the ability to produce historical audit records on demand, particularly for PII-related activities. This feature enables compliance officers to generate filtered exports without requiring workspace admin intervention.

**Acceptance Criteria**:

1. Given I am a compliance-officer with appropriate permissions, when I navigate to the Audit Log Export page, then I see a form with start date, end date, and export format options.

2. When I submit a date range export request, then the system generates a CSV file containing all audit log entries within the specified range, including timestamp, user, action, data source, and affected PII fields.

3. Given I request an export for a date range, when the export completes, then I receive a notification email with a secure download link that expires after 24 hours.

4. When I download the exported audit log, then the file includes a header row with column names and uses proper CSV escaping for special characters in text fields.

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Implementation complete. The export feature uses the existing audit log storage and adds a filtering layer for date ranges. CSV generation handles PII field masking based on tenant configuration.

comments.author: dev1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: QA passed all acceptance criteria. Tested with date ranges spanning multiple tenants and verified the secure download link expiration works correctly. Ready for release in v2.3.
